name: Uncooked Tomato Sauce (Weir)
recipeIngredient: 3 large ripe tomatoes; red or yellow, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all of the ingredients in a large bowl and mix.
2. Leave at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving.
3. The sauce can be refrigerated but should be brought to room temperature before using.
4. Serve over fresh hot pasta; use the same day you make it.
Makes about 3 cups; analysis per 1-cup serving.
